name: Toasted Pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Melt the margarine in a saucepan.
3. Stir the pecans into the melted margarine until they are thoroughly coated.
4. Spread the pecans on a cookie sheet.
5. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes at 350°F, stirring once. Remove from the oven.
6. Sprinkle lightly with salt.
7. Let cool and serve. Store in an airtight container.
